actionItems.title: Add div.pf-v6-c-tree-view wrapper
actionItems.description: PFJ renders the <ul> directly; PF wraps it in a <div class="pf-v6-c-tree-view">. This wrapper is needed for the pf-m-guides modifier and overall component styling.

actionItems.title: Add Multiselectable variation
actionItems.description: PF supports multi-selection (aria-multiselectable="true") where multiple tree items can be selected simultaneously.

actionItems.title: Add With search variation
actionItems.description: PF has a built-in search/filter variant with a text input above the tree that filters visible items.

actionItems.title: Add With badges variation
actionItems.description: PF supports displaying badges next to tree item text.

actionItems.title: Add With custom badges variation
actionItems.description: PF supports custom badge content alongside tree items.

actionItems.title: Add With action items variation
actionItems.description: PF supports action buttons (kebab menus, action icons) on individual tree items.

actionItems.title: Add Compact variation
actionItems.description: PF has a compact variant (pf-m-compact) with reduced spacing.

actionItems.title: Add Compact, no background variation
actionItems.description: PF has a compact variant without background styling (pf-m-compact + pf-m-no-background).

actionItems.title: Fix guides modifier
actionItems.description: PF applies pf-m-guides on the div.pf-v6-c-tree-view wrapper. PFJ must verify that guide lines are properly rendered via this modifier on the wrapper element.

actionItems.title: Add aria-multiselectable on tree
actionItems.description: PF sets aria-multiselectable on the tree <ul> element. PFJ does not set this attribute.

actionItems.title: Add aria-label on tree
actionItems.description: PF sets aria-label on the tree <ul> element. PFJ does not set this.

actionItems.title: Add aria-selected on tree items
actionItems.description: PF sets aria-selected="false" on each <li> treeitem. PFJ omits this attribute.

actionItems.title: Add type="button" on node button
actionItems.description: PF sets type="button" on <button class="pf-v6-c-tree-view__node">. PFJ omits the type attribute.

actionItems.title: Add tabindex="-1" on toggle span
actionItems.description: PF sets tabindex="-1" on <span class="pf-v6-c-tree-view__node-toggle">. PFJ omits this.

actionItems.title: Add aria-checked on checkbox tree items
actionItems.description: PF sets aria-checked="false" on <li> elements in the checkboxes variant. PFJ omits this.

actionItems.title: Toggle icon uses different icon set
actionItems.description: PF uses viewBox="0 0 20 20" (FontAwesome angle-down), PFJ uses viewBox="0 0 32 32" (Red Hat caret-right). Both are valid toggle indicators but differ visually.
